languageDescription: Select your preferred language. You can change this later in Account settings.
aiWorkflowDescription: Connect Toggl CLI to track time directly from your terminal. Install with: npm install -g toggl-cli. Then run: toggl login to connect your account.
configureWorkspaceDescription: Set up your workspace name, currency, and time tracking preferences in Settings. This helps organize your team's work.
starUsDescription: If you enjoy OpenToggl, please star us on GitHub! Your support helps the project grow and attract more contributors.
